Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 29 

NE_NVGTR_AVG_CNTCT_MNTS_NUM 

LABEL: Average duration of successful contacts with beneficiary 

DESCRIPTION: Navigator event (NE) summarizing the average duration (in minutes) of successful contacts between 
the navigator and the beneficiary. 

LONG NAME: NE_NVGTR_AVG_CNTCT_MNTS_NUM 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 5 

SOURCE: AHC data system (derived) 

VALUES: FORMAT: XX.XX (e.g., 5.91,
